{"query":"True Detective Night Country filming production schedule start end dates HBO Max","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1806,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.esquire.com/entertainment/tv/a46363313/true-detective-night-country-hbo-max-release-schedule/","title":"'True Detective' Release Schedule: When Do New Episodes Come Out?","content":"ET from January 14 until the season finale on February 18.
Check out the full release schedule below."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/True_Detective_season_4","title":"True Detective season 4 - Wikipedia","content":"Original release — January 14 (2024-01-14) –
The fourth season of True Detective, an American anthology crime drama television series created by Nic Pizzolatto, premiered on January 14, 2024, on HBO.
In June 2022, HBO officially greenlit the season, with López serving as showrunner.
In September 2022, it was reported that John Hawkes, Christopher Eccleston, Fiona Shaw, Finn Bennett, and Anna Lambe would also appear in the season.
The season was filmed in Iceland and Alaska with a budget of $60 million.
Filming began in November 2022 and wrapped in April 2023.
A first look was unveiled in December 2022 during an HBO sizzle reel.
"True Detective creator on season 3, being 'blown away' by Mahershala Ali".
"'True Detective: Night Country' review: Jodie Foster at the end of the world"."},{"url":"https://www.elle.com/culture/movies-tv/a46352064/true-detective-night-country-episode-release-guide-hbo/","title":"True Detective: Night Country Season 4 Episode Release Schedule","content":"Every item on this page was chosen by an ELLE editor.
To solve the case, Detectives Liz Danvers (Foster) and Evangeline Navarro (Reis) will have to confront the darkness they carry in themselves, and dig into the haunted truths that lie buried under the eternal ice.”
Ahead, how to catch all the new episodes of season 4 as they release.
True Detective: Night Country debuted on HBO on Sunday, January 14, with new episodes premiering every Sunday until the season finale.
The series will also be streaming exclusively on Max.
- Episode 5, “Part 5”: streaming February 9 (9:00 P.M.
ET) on Max before broadcast on February 11 at 9:00 P.M."},{"url":"https://collider.com/true-detective-night-country-filming-locations/","title":"Where Was 'True Detective' Season 4 Filmed?","content":"Actually filming in Alaska is too dangerous, so True Detective: Night Country shot in Iceland; the production crew built a replica Alaskan town from scratch.
Ten years since Season 1 premiered and five years since Season 3 concluded, the HBO crime anthology series returns for its fourth season starring Jodie Foster, Kali Reis, and the state of Alaska (hence the subtitle True Detective: Night Country).
Set in Louisiana, the first season mixed the crime genre with its closest neighbors: noir, horror, and Southern Gothic.
Shooting a massive production on location wasn't possible given the territory's brutal tundra and lack of hospitable space.
Instead, True Detective: Night Country made Iceland its home base.
If True Detective: Night Country needed more snow in December, then by January, Iceland had no shortage of it — plus freezing temperatures and near-constant darkness."},{"url":"https://variety.com/2023/tv/news/true-detective-season-4-night-country-premiere-date-hbo-1235737847/","title":"'True Detective' Season 4 Sets HBO Premiere Date","content":"HBO has set the premiere date for the Season 4 of “True Detective.”
Officially dubbed “True Detective: Night Country,” the six-episode season will launch on Jan.
Princess Daazhraii Johnson, Cathy Tagnak Rexford, and Sam Breckman are producers on the new season.
Per HBO, Daazhraii Johnson and Tagnak Rexford lead an Iñupiaq advisory council to consult on Alaska Native culture featured in the show."}]}

The fourth season of *True Detective*, an American anthology crime drama television series created by Nic Pizzolatto, premiered on January 14, 2024, on HBO. The season stars Jodie Foster and Kali Reis as Detectives Liz Danvers and Evangeline Navarro. *Night Country* received widespread acclaim from critics and received the highest viewership for the entire series, as well as the most viewed limited or anthology series for HBO in 2024. The show was ranked amongst the top 10 television programs of the year by the American Film Institute, and garnered 19 Primetime Emmy Award nominations, becoming the most nominated season in the series. At the 82nd Golden Globe Awards, it received three nominations including for the Best Limited or Anthology Series or Television Film, with Foster winning Best Actress.","score":0.69795954,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.elle.com/culture/movies-tv/a46352064/true-detective-night-country-episode-release-guide-hbo","title":"True Detective: Night Country Season 4 Episode Release Schedule","content":"True Detective: Night Country debuted on HBO on Sunday, January 14, with new episodes premiering every Sunday until the season finale.","score":0.6533265,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.facebook.com/HBO/posts/a-long-winter-night-falls-in-ennis-alaska-production-has-begun-on-truedetective-/10161078842723933","title":"True Detective: Night Country production begins","content":"A long winter night falls in Ennis, Alaska.\n \nProduction has begun on #TrueDetective #NightCountry.
